name: Sigil Compliance Validator
description: CRE-powered compliance layer for the ERC-8004 agent economy. Protocols define rules, agents get stamped, stamps live on-chain in 8004's Validation Registry. Two-agent system: Scribe (policy onboarding) and Assessor (compliance evaluation).

agents.name: Scribe
agents.description: Conversational AI agent that helps protocols define compliance rules through natural language. Translates requirements into structured rule sets and registers policies on-chain.

agents.name: Assessor
agents.description: Autonomous assessment agent that evaluates agents against policy rules using on-chain data, transaction history, and AI reasoning. Pins evidence to IPFS and writes compliance stamps to the 8004 Validation Registry.

usage: read: agent identity lookup during assessment
write: agent submits validationRequest, Sigil writes validationResponse
read: agent reputation scoring during assessment
write: agents and protocols rate Scribe + Assessor
